---
id: v-2-access
title: "Get the user's access"
description: "Everything the signed-in user's app needs to operate offline: their units with the evaluated access state, the entry points for their zones, the NFC keys, and the facility timezone. Authenticated with the user's Bearer token. Cache it and refresh on launch / pull-to-refresh."
sidebar_label: "Get the user's access"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/kiss-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get the user's access"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/access"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Everything the signed-in user's app needs to operate offline: their units with the evaluated access state, the entry points for their zones, the NFC keys, and the facility timezone. Authenticated with the user's Bearer token. Cache it and refresh on launch / pull-to-refresh.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>
